data.body: Pushed to Gerrit: change 738 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/738), commit 8aab907. Trims the make lint/make typecheck double-run (adds lint,typecheck to the CI pre-commit SKIP in both workflows) + regression guard test, per the OSS-practice comparison. Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, then submit + close.
